# DUI Primitives — Unstyled, Accessible Web Components

> Structure and behavior only. No aesthetic opinions.
> Extend with your own CSS to build any design system.

## Getting Started

Install: npm install @deepfuture/dui-primitives
Import: import { DuiButtonPrimitive } from "@dui/primitives/button";

## Primitives

### Accordion
- Tag: `<dui-accordion>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/accordion`
- Description: Vertically stacked sections with expandable/collapsible panels.
- Properties: value (string[] | undefined), defaultValue (string[], []), disabled (boolean, false), multiple (boolean, false), loopFocus (boolean, true), orientation ("vertical" | "horizontal", "vertical")
- Events: value-change (string[])
- Slots: default (dui-accordion-item children)

### Button
- Tag: `<dui-button>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/button`
- Description: A clickable button element. Renders as <a> when href is provided.
- Properties: disabled (boolean, false), type ("button" | "submit" | "reset", "button"), href (string), target (string)
- Events: dui-navigate ({ href: string })
- Slots: default (Button content)

### Checkbox
- Tag: `<dui-checkbox>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/checkbox`
- Description: A tri-state checkbox with form participation.
- Properties: checked (boolean, false), indeterminate (boolean, false), disabled (boolean, false), name (string), value (string, "on")
- Events: change
- Slots: default (Checkbox label), indicator (Custom check indicator)

### Dialog
- Tag: `<dui-dialog>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/dialog`
- Description: A modal dialog with focus trapping and backdrop.
- Properties: open (boolean, false), modal (boolean, true)
- Events: open-change (boolean)
- Slots: default (Dialog sub-components)

### Input
- Tag: `<dui-input>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/input`
- Description: A text input with form participation.
- Properties: value (string, ""), type (string, "text"), placeholder (string), disabled (boolean, false), name (string)
- Events: input, change

### Switch
- Tag: `<dui-switch>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/switch`
- Description: A toggle switch with form participation.
- Properties: checked (boolean, false), disabled (boolean, false), name (string)
- Events: change
- Slots: default (Label)

### Tabs
- Tag: `<dui-tabs>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/tabs`
- Description: Tabbed content with keyboard navigation and ARIA tabs pattern.
- Properties: value (string | undefined), defaultValue (string), orientation ("horizontal" | "vertical", "horizontal")
- Events: value-change (string)
- Slots: default (dui-tabs-list and dui-tabs-panel children)

### Toast Region
- Tag: `<dui-toast-region>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/toast`
- Description: Viewport and provider for a stack of toasts. Manages position, registry, and pause-on-hover/focus/visibility.
- Properties: position ("top-left" | "top-center" | "top-right" | "bottom-left" | "bottom-center" | "bottom-right", "bottom-right"), maxVisible (number, 3), label (string, "Notifications"), expandOnHover (boolean, true), expanded (boolean | undefined), swipeDirections (string), swipeThreshold (number, 50), hotkey (string, "Alt+T")
- Events: toast-dismiss ({ id, reason })
- Slots: default (One or more <dui-toast> elements.)

### Toast
- Tag: `<dui-toast>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/toast`
- Description: A single toast notification with auto-dismiss, ARIA wiring, and three escape valves for content control.
- Properties: open (boolean | undefined), defaultOpen (boolean, true), duration (number, 4000), type ("default" | "info" | "success" | "warning" | "error" | "loading", "default"), priority ("polite" | "assertive", "polite"), toastId (string), headless (boolean, false)
- Events: open-change ({ open: boolean }), dismiss ({ id, reason })
- Slots: default (Default content; rendered after title/description.), title (Title content; auto-wires aria-labelledby.), description (Description content; auto-wires aria-describedby.), action (Action region (typically <dui-toast-action>).), close (Close region (typically <dui-toast-close>).)

### Toast Action
- Tag: `<dui-toast-action>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/toast`
- Description: Wrapper that dismisses the parent toast on click with reason 'action'.
- Slots: default (Action button or content.)

### Toast Close
- Tag: `<dui-toast-close>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/toast`
- Description: Wrapper that dismisses the parent toast on click with reason 'close'.
- Slots: default (Close button or icon.)

### Tooltip
- Tag: `<dui-tooltip>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/tooltip`
- Description: A popup tooltip triggered on hover/focus.
- Properties: open (boolean, false), placement (string, "top"), delay (number, 300)
- Events: open-change (boolean)
- Slots: default (Trigger and popup sub-components)

### Tree
- Tag: `<dui-tree>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/tree`
- Description: A hierarchical tree view with keyboard navigation and optional selection. Follows the W3C APG Treeview pattern.
- Properties: expandedValues (string[] | undefined), defaultExpandedValues (string[], []), selectionMode ("none" | "single" | "multiple", "none"), selectedValues (string[] | undefined), defaultSelectedValues (string[], []), disabled (boolean, false)
- Events: dui-expanded-change ({ values: string[] }), dui-selection-change ({ values: string[] }), dui-action ({ value: string })
- Slots: default (<dui-tree-item> children)

### Tree Item
- Tag: `<dui-tree-item>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/tree`
- Description: A node in a <dui-tree>. Becomes a branch automatically when it contains child <dui-tree-item> elements.
- Properties: value (string), disabled (boolean, false), hasChildren (boolean, false), loading (boolean, false)
- Events: dui-load-children ({ value: string })
- Slots: label (The visible label/content for this node), end (Trailing content (icons, badges, actions)), default (Child <dui-tree-item> elements (makes this item a branch))

### Popover
- Tag: `<dui-popover>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/popover`
- Description: A floating panel anchored to a trigger element. Uses Floating UI for positioning.
- Properties: open (boolean, false), defaultOpen (boolean, false), side ("top" | "bottom", "bottom"), sideOffset (number, 8)
- Events: open-change ({ open: boolean })
- Slots: default (dui-popover-trigger and dui-popover-popup)

### Popover Trigger
- Tag: `<dui-popover-trigger>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/popover`
- Description: The element that toggles the popover.
- Slots: default (Trigger content (button, link, etc.))

### Popover Popup
- Tag: `<dui-popover-popup>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/popover`
- Description: The floating popover content container.
- Properties: showArrow (boolean, true), closeOnClick (boolean, false)
- Slots: default (Popover content)

### Popover Close
- Tag: `<dui-popover-close>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/popover`
- Description: A button that closes the popover.
- Slots: default (Close button content)

### Splitter
- Tag: `<dui-splitter>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/splitter`
- Description: Resizable panel group implementing the W3C Window Splitter pattern. Panels divided by draggable handles, sized by percent.
- Properties: orientation ("horizontal" | "vertical", "horizontal"), value (number[] | undefined), defaultValue (number[], []), disabled (boolean, false), keyboardStep (number, 10), keyboardStepLarge (number, 25), autoSaveId (string)
- Events: value-change (number[])
- Slots: default (dui-splitter-panel and dui-splitter-handle children in DOM order)

### Splitter Panel
- Tag: `<dui-splitter-panel>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/splitter`
- Description: A single resizable panel inside a dui-splitter. Owns its own min/max constraints.
- Properties: panelId (string), defaultSize (number), minSize (number, 0), maxSize (number, 100), order (number)
- Slots: default (Panel content)

### Splitter Handle
- Tag: `<dui-splitter-handle>`
- Import: `@dui/primitives/splitter`
- Description: Draggable separator between two adjacent panels. Renders role=separator with full ARIA wiring.
- Properties: disabled (boolean, false)
